name: Chakra UI vs Theme UI
description: Comparison guide: Chakra inspired by Theme UI but adds more components, improved styling API, and stronger accessibility defaults.

metadata.intent: Decide between Chakra UI and Theme UI

must_use: Pick based on component coverage vs your need for a lighter system
must_not: Assume similar theming implies similar component ergonomics
conventions: If you want more built-in components + prop-based ergonomics, Chakra often fits; if you want a smaller system, Theme UI can be attractive.

steps.description: Chakra was inspired by Theme UI and follows system UI specs, but aims to be a more robust, component-rich system with a very intuitive prop-based styling API.
Choose Chakra when: you want many accessible components, strong theming + dark mode patterns, and a highly ergonomic style-props API.
Choose Theme UI when: you want a lighter-weight theming-first system and prefer to build more of the component layer yourself.
